title: ozoroa gossweileri
intro: Ozoroa gossweileri, also known as the Gossweiler's wax tree, is a plant species in the family Anacardiaceae, native to Angola. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ozoroa gossweileri include wound healing, antimicrobial activity, and potential anticancer properties. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, with the leaves and bark being the primary sources for herbal preparations.
